heading: Presidential power to ration gasoline among classes of end-users unaffected
label: 4515 Presidential power to ration gasoline among classes of end-users unaffected
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to authorize the President to institute, without the approval of the Congress, a program for the rationing of gasoline among classes of end-users.
notes: Termination of SectionFor termination of section, see .section 4564(a) of this title
